revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-195

Transmissivity (of an absorbing material)

The internal transmittance of a layer of the material such that the path of the radiation is of Unit: length, and under conditions in which the boundary of the material has no influence.

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
